birds

2026-02-28

R Markdown

This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com.

When you click the Knit button a document will be generated that includes both content as well as the output of any embedded R code chunks within the document. You can embed an R code chunk like this:

library("tidyverse")
## ── Attaching core tidyverse packages ──────────────────────── tidyverse 2.0.0 ──
## ✔ dplyr     1.1.4     ✔ readr     2.1.5
## ✔ forcats   1.0.1     ✔ stringr   1.5.2
## ✔ ggplot2   4.0.0     ✔ tibble    3.3.0
## ✔ lubridate 1.9.4     ✔ tidyr     1.3.1
## ✔ purrr     1.1.0     
## ── Conflicts ────────────────────────────────────────── tidyverse_conflicts() ──
## ✖ dplyr::filter() masks stats::filter()
## ✖ dplyr::lag()    masks stats::lag()
## ℹ Use the conflicted package (<http://conflicted.r-lib.org/>) to force all conflicts to become errors
birds <- read.csv("data/bird_collision.csv")
bird_collision <- read.csv("data/bird_collision.csv") %>% 
  select(!(starts_with("scaled")))
bird_no_zero <- bird_collision %>% 
  filter(count!=0)
collisions_date_sep <- bird_collision %>% 
  separate(col="date", into = c("month","day","year"), sep = "/") %>% 
  select(!day) %>% 
  mutate(month=as.factor(month))

Collisions by month:

collisions_date_sep %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=month,y=count))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  coord_cartesian(y=c(0,30))

Collisions by building:

bird_collision %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=building,y=count))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  coord_cartesian(y=c(0,30))

Collisions vs building height:

bird_collision %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=ceiling_height,y=count))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method=lm)+
  coord_cartesian(y=c(0,30))
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

Collisions vs visibility:

bird_collision %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=visibility_distance,y=count))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method=lm)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

Collisions vs migration amount:

bird_collision %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=amt,y=count))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method=lm)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

NO ZERO:

Collisions by building:

bird_no_zero %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=building,y=count))+
  geom_boxplot()+
  geom_smooth(method=lm)+
  coord_cartesian(y=c(0,30))
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

Collisions vs building height:

bird_no_zero %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=ceiling_height,y=count))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method=lm)+
  coord_cartesian(y=c(0,30))
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

Collisions vs visibility:

bird_no_zero %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=visibility_distance,y=count))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method=lm)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

Collisions vs migration amount:

bird_no_zero %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=amt,y=count))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method=lm)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

SCALED:

Collisions vs building height:

birds %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=scaled_ceiling_height,y=count))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method=lm)+
  coord_cartesian(y=c(0,30))
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

Collisions vs uwind:

birds %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=scaled_uwind,y=count))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method=lm)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

vwind:

birds %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=scaled_vwind,y=count))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method=lm)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'

Collisions vs migration amount:

birds %>% 
  ggplot(aes(x=scaled_amt,y=count))+
  geom_point()+
  geom_smooth(method=lm)
## `geom_smooth()` using formula = 'y ~ x'
